mnemonics: A DIME (Additive, Decomposition, Integrated, Multiplicative, Exponential) can buy a good time series model.
Every Student Can Pass (Explanatory, Seasonal, Cyclical, Pattern) if they understand the components.
keyPoints: Decompose a series into Trend, Seasonal, Cyclical, and Irregular components.
Use differencing to make a non-stationary series stationary.
Evaluate model performance using metrics like RMSE and MAPE on a holdout set.
commonMistakes: Fitting a model to the entire dataset without validating on a holdout sample, leading to overfitting.
Applying a model without first checking for and handling stationarity, resulting in spurious correlations.
